notes: Game works native and on Proton out of the box. I installed manually D9VK and it worked as well fine with this DX9 to Vulkan translation (only some minor graphical glitches).
title: The Last Tinker™: City of Colors

notes:
The game works great, if you turn off shadows and water effects.
Sometimes, when pausing the game, the cursor disappears, but this isn't a problem, just use the keyboard in the menu.
title: The Last Tinker™: City of Colors
